title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 226.095 - Arbitration for negligence actions, when
text:
226.095.  Arbitration for negligence actions, when. — Upon request of the plaintiff in a negligence action against the department of transportation as defendant, the case shall be arbitrated by a panel of three arbiters pursuant to the provisions of chapter 435.
(L. 1999 S.B. 295 & 46 § 2) 
(2001) Section requiring Highways and Transportation Commission to submit to arbitration when plaintiff with negligence claim against Commission requests arbitration is constitutional. Murray v. Missouri Highways and Transportation Commission, 37 S.W.3d 228 (Mo.banc).
